NVDA.thesis: Goldman Sachs: 21.7x P/E compelling post-Kyber delay denial. 3-day gain streak, moderate upward momentum. Still ~14% below 52-week high.
NVDA.risks: Below 52-week high; Kyber delay is a near-term overhang

AAPL.thesis: Quiet news day. Down -0.77% with limited catalyst. No near-term event to trade around.
AAPL.risks: N/A — low news flow, sideways action

TSLA.thesis: Triple catalyst bounce: Miami robotaxi debut Jul 5, European registrations +57.2% YoY, NHTSA closed 2022 investigation. RBC raised PT to $500. BUT: P/E 381x, EPS -46.79% YoY, revenue -2.93% YoY. Intraday bearish signals post-bounce.
TSLA.risks: Fundamental deterioration; high multiple at risk if sentiment shifts; still below prior $432 high

MSFT.thesis: Near-flat on the day. Headwind: Bloomberg report that Starbucks is replacing Microsoft/IBM software with in-house AI — signals enterprise churn risk at the margin.
MSFT.risks: Enterprise AI replacement narrative if Starbucks story generalizes

AMD.thesis: Advancing AI 2026 event Jul 22-23 (Lisa Su keynote, SF); MI450 GPU ramp + Helios rack-scale H2 2026 visibility; Q2 earnings Aug 4. Goldman: durable server CPU demand. 142% YTD — event is a clear near-term catalyst.
AMD.risks: P/E 75x — event disappointment = sharp reversal. Already up 7% today, partial buy-in risk

GOOGL.thesis: META cloud announcement is a competitive headwind (cloud revenue share at risk). Down 2.0% yesterday. No positive catalyst visible today.
GOOGL.risks: META cloud buildout accelerating competitive dynamic for GCP

META.thesis: Major catalyst: META announced cloud computing division to compete with AWS/Azure/GCP. Plan to lease excess data center capacity to recoup capex. Jumped ~6% pre-market. Strong conviction on infrastructure monetization narrative.
META.risks: Cloud buildout is capital-intensive; stock already up 6% — buy-in risk; sell-the-news dynamic possible
META.headline: Meta announces cloud computing plans to rival Amazon, Microsoft

AMZN.thesis: Near-flat. META cloud announcement is a headwind for AWS (competitive dynamic). Down 0.4% yesterday. No positive catalyst.
AMZN.risks: If META cloud gains traction, AWS market share narrative weakens at the margin
